deploy.startCommand:
sed -i 's/translateY(-100px);/translateY(-100px);opacity:0;/' public/index.html && sed -i 's/#toast.show {/#toast.show {opacity:1;/' public/index.html && sed -i 's|
IDA
|
IDA
|' public/index.html && sed -i 's|class="header-logo">|class="header-logo">|' public/index.html && node server.js
